name: Yovo
rule: One day, one list. Max 4 tasks. 24 hours each. Then archive.
manifesto: Tomorrow doesn't exist yet. Yesterday won't come back. Think about today.
positioning: Yovo removes the comfort of endless replanning. The daily cap forces selection. The 24-hour limit forces timing. The archive prevents yesterday from endlessly bleeding into today.

colors._note: TO CONFIRM with Quentin — defaults below extracted/inferred from the site

fonts._note: TO CONFIRM with Quentin — defaults to Inter (system fallback). If a Yovo-specific .ttf/.otf is provided, drop it in src/templates/shared/fonts/ and update this entry.
fonts.heading: Inter

voice.tone: minimal, anti-noise, direct, kind but firm

audience: Students who want to study without panicking
Founders who want to execute step by step
Freelancers who want to structure the day clearly
Parents who want a readable day despite interruptions
Anyone who wants a simple, ad-free daily system

enhancement: Three built-in themes (Yovo Green, Classy, Winter Ark)
Time windows (restrict app usage to set hours)

quotable_lines: It removes the comfort of endless replanning.
